canonical_answer: At 2s, a man in a grey polo shirt appears with a company logo; at 8s, five winged insects appear in a column on the right side; at 10s, text reading Subterranean termites displays with connecting lines; at 18s, the words TO TREAT appear in red above the existing text label.

canonical_answer: The person pours liquid from the white bucket into the muddy trench.
